name: McMunn & Yates Building Suppliesorp
message: McMunn & Yates Building SuppliesIt is a story about family first and foremost, of two families coming together. McMunn & Yates was formed in 1971 when Terry Yates and Stan and Gordon McMunn opened their first store in Dauphin, MB. With combined experience in both contract work and retail, this union of families put their faith in each other to build and rebuild something larger than themselves, now hundreds of families serving their local communities large and small. McMunn & Yates is committed to and believe in the hometown values and doing business with their friends and neighbors. We believe the "and" in McMunn & Yates is more than just a conjunction because without it, there are no connections and no commitment. We believe its this commitment to building strong, honest relationships that is the foundation upon which McMunn & Yates rests.McMunn & Yates Commercial Division is a major supplier to builders and contractors. Our Contractor Division delivers with a dedicated team that handles phone-in orders in an efficient and timely manner and provide enhanced contractor services. TIM-BR-FAB Industries is a manufacturer of roof and floor trusses and supplier of pre-engineered wood products serving Manitoba, Saskatchewan and Northwestern Ontario with quality products from its two manufacturing plants located in Dauphin, MB and Oak Bluff, MB. Tim-Br-Fab has a wide selection of manufactured truss systems to choose from or you can work with our specialized design team to build what is right for you. Our cost effective designs are tailored to meet our customers needs and we offer the most durable roof and floor components available today. McMunn & Yates Post Frame Division manufacturers post-frame buildings. Available in fully customized range of styles and sizes, McMunn & Yates Post Frame Division delivers the strongest posts, industry-wide. Steinbach Concrete Division  provides reliable service and quality Redi Mix concrete at competitive prices to Steinbach and surrounding areas. Our Concrete Division is able to handle various sized jobs including basement walls and floors, garage floors, shop floors, footings, driveways and sidewalks. McMunn & Yates Furniture & Appliances  is a 15,000 square foot showroom located in Yorkton, SK and is packed with new and exciting pieces for every room in your home, cottage or dorm room. Proudly serving Yorkton and its surrounding areas: Melville, Canora, Langenburg, Churchbridge, Saltcoats, Bredenbury, Springside, Theodore, Esterhazy and Roblin for over 50 years, our Sales Specialists will assist in selecting the perfect products fit for your needs and budget. Jenkins, The Flooring People, presents the newest trends in flooring covering products and the expert assistance of our experienced Sales Team. From home and cottage to office or small business and commercial projects including hospitals, schools, restaurants and other facilities. From selecting the most efficient flooring covering, the ideal colour or pattern and coordinating the installation of your product at the job site, Jenkins Sales Team will assist you every step of the way.Geo: Canada - Leak size: 17 GB Archive - Contains: Files
